---
name: Feature request / 功能请求
about: Suggest a teaching-focused improvement. / 建议一个面向教学的改进。
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary / 摘要

Describe the feature or improvement.

请描述这个功能或改进。

## Learning Goal / 学习目标

What should learners understand after using this?

学习者使用它之后应理解什么？

## Proposed Experience / 预期体验

Which command, document, or example should change?

哪条命令、哪个文档或哪个示例需要变化？

## Scope / 范围

What is included, and what should stay out of scope?

包含哪些内容？哪些内容应保持在范围之外？

## Alternatives / 替代方案

Are there smaller or simpler ways to teach the same concept?

是否有更小或更简单的方式教授同一个概念？
